steps.title: This protocol (Part 2) performs washing...
steps.instruction: This protocol (Part 2) performs washing and elution on the OT2 as the second part of automated immunoprecipitation using Thermo Fisher Dynabeads Protein A or Protein G. The user can determine the number of samples to be processed. The samples (e.g. cell lysates), Dynabeads and the antibody specific for the protein of interest will be transferred to and mixed in a 96-well deepwell working plate on the OT2. The first part of the protocol completes at this point allowing the user to move the working plate to an agitation device, an antibody/target protein incubation period determined by the user. After incubation, the process proceeds with the second part of the protocol on the OT2. Dynabeads/antibody/target protein complex will be washed, eluted and heated to denature. The final product is ready for SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: The mixture of sample, antibody and...
steps.instruction: The mixture of sample, antibody and beads after incubation (working plate) is moved back to the magnetic module (slot 1), and Part 2 starts.

steps.title: Supernatant in the working plate is...
steps.instruction: Supernatant in the working plate is removed (slot 4) by the 8-channel pipet with magnetic module on.

steps.title: Wash buffer is transferred (slot 2)...
steps.instruction: Wash buffer is transferred (slot 2) to the working plate (slot 1), and precipitated beads resuspended (magnetic module off), re-precipitated and supernatant removed (magnetic module on).

steps.title: Step 2 repeat 2 more times
steps.instruction: Step 2 repeat 2 more times. All wash steps are handled by the 8-channel pipet, and the tips reused.

steps.title: Elution buffer (in a 15 mL...
steps.instruction: Elution buffer (in a 15 mL tube, slot 4) is transferred to the working plate (slot 1) by the single-channel pipet.

steps.title: Beads and elution buffer is mixed...
steps.instruction: Beads and elution buffer is mixed and transferred by the 8-channel pipet to the final plate (slot 3).

steps.title: The final plate is sealed, and...
steps.instruction: The final plate is sealed, and temperature module activated and set to heat the final plate for 10 minutes at 70 degree C.
